rows.label: tev001094_MSG0001
rows.name: Oh. Hello, [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001094_MSG0002
rows.name: ......[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001094_MSG0006
rows.name:
I was just thinking about how good these
hot dogs look. And smell, I suppose.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001094_JNK0010
rows.name: Treat

rows.label: tev001094_SEL0011
rows.name: Buy Fog Christoph a hot dog.

rows.label: tev001094_JNK0020
rows.name: Suggest

rows.label: tev001094_SEL0021
rows.name: Suggest that Fog Christoph buy himself a dog.

rows.label: tev001094_MSG0007
rows.name:
N-no, thank you. That's a
very generous offer, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001094_MSG0008
rows.name: Well, my brother would be furious at me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001094_MSG0009
rows.name:
I have a lot of...anxiety issues around strangers, and
my brother says I have to get comfortable doing things
like talking to shopkeepers and ordering food.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001094_MSG0010
rows.name:
Life would certainly be a lot easier if I
had the courage to buy my own hot dog![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001094_MSG0011
rows.name:
But the vendor looks busy right now,
so I don't want to be a bother.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001094_MSG0012
rows.name:
I wish they'd just allow you
to place orders remotely.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001094_MSG0013
rows.name:
When I say things like that,
it upsets my brother.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001094_MSG0014
rows.name:
"What are you gonna do when you're 30 or
40 years old?" he says. "What if you
still can't do this crap by yourself?"[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001094_MSG0015
rows.name:
I've given it a lot of thought,
and while I don't think that
he's necessarily wrong...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001094_MSG0016
rows.name:
It IS worth noting that this body is a
Blue Blood, so I can probably just pretend
to be this young for as long as I want.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001094_JNK0030
rows.name: Probe

rows.label: tev001094_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Fog Christoph what he'll do once he returns to his old body.

rows.label: tev001094_JNK0040
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev001094_SEL0041
rows.name: Agree that Fog Christoph is probably right about that.

rows.label: tev001094_MSG0017
rows.name: ......[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001094_MSG0018
rows.name: I'm going to buy a hot dog![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001094_MSG0019
rows.name:
If I gather my courage, there's nothing
I can't do. I have to believe that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001094_MSG0020
rows.name:
See, exactly! I'll just continue to be the
same kid who can't buy a hot dog by himself
for the next century! Or two. Or whatever.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001094_MSG0021
rows.name: ......[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001094_MSG0025
rows.name:
Geez, it sounds kind of pathetic when I
put it like that. I'm just going to muster
up the courage and go buy that hot dog![ST:wait ]
